allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const html=fs.readFileSync\('dist/dante/index.html','utf8'\);const m=html.match\(/<script>[\\s\\S]*?<\\/script>\\s*<\\/body>/\);try{new Function\(m[0].replace\(/<\\/?script>/g,''\)\);console.log\('✓ script parses cleanly'\);}catch\(e\){console.log\('✗ syntax error:',e.message\);}")
